message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl + last-touched bookmark

Routine beads state export from `br sync --flush-only` picking up the set
of issue mutations made during the current pages-fsync / assertion-
hardening batch. No schema changes; only record-level updates.

Diff shape: +6/-2 in issues.jsonl (issue mutations, not new issues), plus
`last-touched` moving forward to the most-recently-touched bead in this
session. These are the flushed-JSONL artifacts Beads emits so that
dependency graphs, `br ready`, and bv analytics stay consistent across
agents/machines.

Non-invasive — no git operations triggered by `br` itself, per the
"beads never runs git" contract in AGENTS.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
